tips: Simplicity is prerequisite for reliability. - Edsger W. Dijkstra
Testing shows the presence, not the absence of bugs. - Edsger W. Dijkstra
The tools we use have a profound (and devious!) influence on our thinking habits. - Edsger Dijkstra
Premature optimization is the root of all evil. - Donald Knuth
Adding manpower to a late software project makes it later. - Fred Brooks
There is no silver bullet. - Fred Brooks
The programmer, like the poet, works only slightly removed from pure thought-stuff. - Fred Brooks
Controlling complexity is the essence of computer programming. - Brian Kernighan
Everyone knows that debugging is twice as hard as writing a program in the first place. - Kernighan & Plauger
Don't comment bad code - rewrite it. - Kernighan & Plauger
The most damaging phrase in the language is: it's always been done that way. - Grace Hopper
It's easier to ask forgiveness than it is to get permission. - Grace Hopper
The best way to predict the future is to invent it. - Alan Kay
Simplicity does not precede complexity, but follows it. - Alan Perlis
Optimization hinders evolution. - Alan Perlis
Is it possible that software is not like anything else, that it is meant to be discarded? - Alan Perlis
There are only two hard things in computer science: cache invalidation and naming things. - Phil Karlton
Good programmers write code that humans can understand. - Martin Fowler
Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute. - Harold Abelson
The price of reliability is the pursuit of the utmost simplicity. - C.A.R. Hoare
Don't generalize; generalizations are generally wrong. - Butler Lampson
In allocating resources, strive to avoid disaster rather than to attain an optimum. - Butler Lampson
We will never find a process that allows us to design software in a perfectly rational way. - David Parnas
Shipping first time code is like going into debt. - Ward Cunningham
There is no such thing as a design group which is both organized and unbiased. - Melvin Conway
The purpose of computing is insight, not numbers. - Richard Hamming
Talk is cheap. Show me the code. - Linus Torvalds
We can only see a short distance ahead, but we can see plenty there that needs to be done. - Alan Turing
If a human operator needs to touch your system during normal operations, you have a bug. - Carla Geisser
We strive to make a service reliable enough, but no more reliable than it needs to be. - Marc Alvidrez
Remember that the code path you never use is the code path that (often) doesn't work. - Mike Ulrich
Stop the bleeding, restore service, and preserve the evidence for root-causing. - Andrew Stribblehill
Clearly, a slow response is a lot worse than no response. - Michael Nygard
Integration points are the number-one killer of systems. - Michael Nygard
Fault tolerance mechanisms hide failures. - James Hamilton
An operations engineer working under pressure at 2 a.m. will make mistakes. - James Hamilton
Post-accident attribution to a 'root cause' is fundamentally wrong. - Richard Cook
Complex systems run in degraded mode. - Richard Cook
They are, after all, the most expert in their own error. - John Allspaw
Once you deploy, you aren't testing code anymore, you're testing systems. - Charity Majors
Configuration bugs, not code bugs, are the most common cause I've seen of really bad outages. - Dan Luu
Aiming to "monitor everything" can prove to be an anti-pattern. - Cindy Sridharan
The cost of failure should be weighed against the cost of mitigation. - Adrian Cockcroft
The hottest new programming language is English. - Andrej Karpathy
Usually they are doing the generation, and we as humans are doing the verification. - Andrej Karpathy
A large amount of thought for me goes into how we keep AI on the leash. - Andrej Karpathy
We want AI agents that can discover like we can, not which contain what we have discovered. - Rich Sutton
Not all debt is bad, but all debt needs to be serviced. - D. Sculley et al.
Hidden debt is dangerous because it compounds silently. - D. Sculley et al.
Don't be afraid to launch a product without machine learning. - Martin Zinkevich
Keep the first model simple and get the infrastructure right. - Martin Zinkevich
Proving to yourself that the code works is your job. - Simon Willison
If you're using an LLM to write code without even running it yourself, what are you doing? - Simon Willison
Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it's bad. - Cory House
Debugging is like being the detective in a crime movie where you are also the murderer. - Filipe Fortes
